violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a cutting board, the hand washing sink in the serving kitchen was blocked by a shelf and was lacking paper towel. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

the two door low boy located in serving area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. The doors on the two door freezer in the serving area were in poor condition. The equipment must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
Food boxes were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

Cardboard is used in the construction of floor mats in the walk-in cooler area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair at the low boy freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen/preparation area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

The non-food contacts surfaces of the floor at the walk-in freezer, shelves and preparation tables have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
